data.title: Somnigroup International Inc. to engage in discussions with Leggett & Platt Inc. (NYSE: LEG). Statement issued in response.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Somnigroup International Inc. (NYSE: SGI) responded to the news from Leggett & Platt Inc. (NYSE: LEG) that its Board of Directors approved discussions and engaged in standard procedures.

data.title: Trilogy Metals adds to advisory team after US investment, expanding strategic capabilities.
data.description: Trilogy Metals Inc., a company listed on NYSE American under the ticker TMQ as well as on TSX, based in Vancouver, BC, made an announcement on Jan. 20, 2026, regarding the expansion of its advisory and leadership teams. This move comes subsequent to the investment received from the US on October 6, 2025.

data.title: KeyCorp's Q4 2025 net income: $474M; revenue $2.0B; full year revenue $7.5B; pre-provision net revenue up $46M quarter-over-quarter.
data.description: The company reported a revenue of $2.0 billion and a record full-year revenue of $7.5 billion, representing a 16% increase year-over-year when adjusted for selected items. Pre-provision net revenue increased by $46 million quarter-over-quarter, with a full-year increase of 44% year-over-year when adjusted for selected items.

data.title: CGI partners with Google Cloud to enhance AI outcomes for clients. Stock market symbols: GIB.A (TSX), GIB (NYSE).
data.description: In a recent press release on January 20, 2026, CGI Inc. (NYSE: GIB) (TSX: GIB.A), a leading independent IT and business consulting services company, shared news of expanding its global partnership with Google Cloud. The company, with stock market symbols GIB.A (TSX) and GIB (NYSE), is one of the biggest players in the industry and continues to strengthen its alliances.

data.title: 3M reports Q4 2025 sales of $6.1B, up 2.1% with EPS at $1.07 down 20%. Adjusted EPS was $1.83, up 9%. Operating margin down 510 bps.
data.description: In the fourth quarter, the company reported GAAP sales totaling $6.1 billion, marking a 2.1% increase from the previous year. The operating margin was reported at 13.0%, showing a decrease of 510 basis points. Earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.07, reflecting a 20% decrease year-over-year (YoY). Adjusted sales for the same period amounted to $6.0 billion, showcasing a 2.2% organic growth YoY. The adjusted operating margin saw an increase of 140 basis points YoY, reaching 21.1%. Adjusted EPS also improved by 9% YoY, coming in at $1.83. Furthermore, the company reported Q4 operating cash flow...

data.title: PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) announces monthly cash distribution to record holders on Jan. 30, payable on Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) announced a monthly cash distribution for shareholders holding trust units as of January 30, 2026. The distribution will be payable on February 13, 2026.

data.title: BofA awards $1B in stock to non-executive employees, 9th consecutive year, totaling nearly $6.8B.
data.description: For the ninth year in a row, Bank of America based in Charlotte, North Carolina, disclosed their plan to provide $1 billion to their employees via the Sharing Success Program. This marks a total of close to $6.8 billion in awards granted to teammates over the years.

data.title: Leggett & Platt signs non-disclosure agreement and 6-month standstill with Somnigroup for due diligence and potential transaction talks.
data.description: In Carthage, Missouri, on January 20, 2026, Leggett & Platt revealed that their Board of Directors has agreed to a standard non-disclosure agreement and a 6-month standstill period with Somnigroup. This agreement aims to aid in conducting standard due diligence processes and assess the feasibility of reaching a transaction between the two parties.

data.title: Global Patient Engagement Solutions Market set to grow at CAGR of 21.25%, reaching USD 229.5 billion by 2035 due to rising demand for patient-centric healthcare.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in New York, the Global Patient Engagement Solutions Market is experiencing significant changes due to the global healthcare systems' transition to value-based care, digital-focused services, and patient-centered healthcare environments. The market is witnessing a surge in demand, with numbers indicating a substantial increase in the implementation of patient engagement solutions to enhance healthcare delivery and outcomes.

data.title: Neinor Homes meets FY25 guidance with 2,900 units delivered, strong Total Revenues and Adj. EBITDA. Growth expected.
data.description: During a trading update for the fiscal year 2025, Neinor announced that it has successfully delivered approximately 2,900 units. The company reported that its Total Revenues and Adjusted EBITDA have performed at the upper end of the predicted range provided by the company's guidance.

data.title: CHC Navigation releases Apache 6 USV for marine surveying, equipped with NORBIT™ echosounders. Built for high-resolution mapping in aquatic conditions.
data.description: On January 20, 2026 in Shanghai, CHC Navigation (CHCNAV), a leading worldwide supplier of geospatial technologies, unveiled the Apache 6 – 2026 Edition, a sophisticated Unmanned Surface Vessel (USV) tailored for precise bathymetric and 3D mapping tasks. Specifically engineered to support NORBIT™ multibeam echosounders, the Apache 6 offers a complete package for underwater mapping, object localization, and aid in offshore construction operations across diverse water environments.
